title: malaxis sciaphila
intro: Malaxis sciaphila, also known as the Night-blooming Malaxis or Ghost Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is prized for its unique nocturnal blooming habit, where the white flowers open at night and close during the day. The Malaxis sciaphila has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's extracts can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
